rulings.Case Title: IMAD JWEINAT VS. ANSELMO ESTRADA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 1, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANT MARIA DELGADO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend to address all issues raised by demurrer. No opposition filed. Plaintiff shall have 5 days from notice of entry of order to file an amended complaint. Defendant to prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID TSAO VS. GENERAL TSO KITCHEN, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 1, 2019 line 7. DEFENDANT GENERAL TSO KITCHEN, INC.'s MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND Hearing Required. By no later that 9:00 a.m. on October 1, 2019 Defendant's counsel to submit a declaration: (1) Listing cases in which his re-notice of motion was accepted by the Clerk on SF Superior Court on the date of the hearing after a tentative ruling has been issued and before the hearing; (2) providing authority (no argument) allowing re-notice of the motion on the date of the hearing after the tentative has been issued and before the hearing; (3) explaining why the demurrer filed on August 26, 2019 was set for hearing on September 4, 2019; what authority was relied upon and addressing service by mail for September 4, 2019 hearing. = (501/REQ)
